title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Cracker, Unknown person #2, Judge, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And she's run away from home...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: she also wanted the freedom to choose her own love, and set off on the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: On a journey of court- ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just have to see my girls!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can have this, it's really special! It's my mom's vivre card!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NAMIZOU, you and I are now officially sworn sisters.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoaa!! That's awesome!! Captain Lola's mom is some big wig pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take special care of that, it's sure to come in handy later!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was born in the new world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...so then that means, this guy here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HAKI?! ...No... that was some- thing else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They withered away from... Fear alone?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
